title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 701.330 - No liability for providing information — exception — penalty
text:
701.330.  No liability for providing information — exception — penalty. — 1.  No individual or organization providing information to the department in accordance with sections 701.318 to 701.330 shall be deemed to be, or be held, liable, either civilly or criminally, for divulging confidential information unless such individual or organization acted in bad faith, negligently, or with malicious purpose.
  2.  Nothing in sections 701.318 to 701.330 shall be construed to compel any individual to submit to a medical or health department examination, treatment or supervision of any kind.
  3.  Any violation of sections 701.318 to 701.330 is an infraction.
(L. 1993 S.B. 232 § 16, A.L. 1998 H.B. 977 & 1608)
